method: NotebookLM grill export + web cross-check (Anthropic blog, hybrid RAG literature, repo empirical paths)

status_legend.LITERATURE_VERIFIED: Primary or authoritative source supports the procedural claim
status_legend.LITERATURE_PARTIAL: Related evidence exists; exact video metric not replicated
status_legend.LITERATURE_UNSUPPORTED: No reproducible primary source for the exact claim
status_legend.REPO_VERIFIED: Implemented or documented in agent-rules repository

claims.youtube_claim: Production RAG requires hybrid sparse (BM25) + dense retrieval with reranking
claims.summary: Industry practice (2025–2026) documents BM25 + dense + RRF + cross-encoder rerank as production default.

sources.title: Hybrid Search in Production: BM25 + Dense Retrieval

claims.implementation_gate: GO — align books_rag + TGS fused channel; do not cite single-vendor recall % without local eval

claims.youtube_claim: Russell & Norvig agent taxonomy maps to modern LLM agents
claims.summary: Classic reflex / model-based / goal / utility / learning taxonomy is from AIMA (Russell & Norvig).
claims.implementation_gate: GO — map to LifeHarness layers in docs only

claims.youtube_claim: Helper libraries beat markdown-only skills for reliability
claims.summary: agent-rules already uses 40_operations/python helpers + MCP prescreen; notebook reinforces minimal API surface.
claims.implementation_gate: GO — extend prescreen patterns; no SkillRAE/SkillOpt in notebook (not in sources)

claims.youtube_claim: Opus 4.8 beats GPT-5.5 and 4.7 on major agentic benchmarks
claims.summary: Anthropic documents Opus 4.6/4.x family benchmarks; public web cites 4.6 SWE-bench ~80.8%, Terminal-Bench 65.4%. Video says 4.8 without linked reproducible harness in repo.
claims.implementation_gate: NO-GO for rules citing exact Opus 4.8 leaderboard numbers until user-verified release notes

claims.youtube_claim: Single deep-research workflow used 3.1M tokens / 105 agents in ~12 min
claims.summary: Anecdotal demo metric from Claude Code workflows video; not independently reproducible here.
claims.implementation_gate: GO for procedural budget guards (max steps, parallel caps); do not encode 3.1M as SLA

claims.summary: NotebookLM explicitly states these terms are absent from the 16 YouTube transcripts.
claims.implementation_gate: GO — keep existing repo SkillRAE-lite from Geometry track; no new claims from this notebook

claims.youtube_claim: Graph RAG as named pattern in notebook
claims.summary: NotebookLM states Graph RAG is not named in transcripts; multi-hop and hierarchical chunking are covered instead.
claims.implementation_gate: GO — TGS wiki multi-hop covers local graph-like traversal without Microsoft GraphRAG product claims

claims.youtube_claim: Hybrid retrieval should extend books_rag + graph/wiki
claims.summary: fused_rag and search_fused_rag exist; books_rag index completion remains operational dependency.
claims.implementation_gate: GO — P1 close books_rag eval + fused search smoke test

notes: Procedural RAG/harness/re-act recommendations may be implemented without citing Opus 4.8 or 3.1M-token demo numbers.
Re-auth notebooklm-py API session still recommended: python -m notebooklm.notebooklm_cli -p default login
